'Pick Lock'.name: 'Pick Lock'
'Pick Lock'.description: Allows opening of locked chests and doors.

Aether Augmentation.name: Aether Augmentation
Aether Augmentation.description:
Add an |cffffffffAether Augmentation|r to your gun for 1 hour, causing an additional 1 Arcane damage with each shot.

Increases your damage and critical strike chance against Mechanicals by 25% and reduces your Magic damage taken by 10%.

Aftermath.name: Aftermath
Aftermath.description: Casting Sticky Bomb now causes your next 2 Scrap Shots within 10 seconds to cast -50% faster and deal 25% increased damage.

Air Strike.name: Air Strike
Air Strike.description:
Mark the target location for an Air Strike. After 7 seconds, it deals 1250 Fire damage to up to 12 enemies caught within the blast.

This ability always critically strikes.

Anti-Cloaking Device.name: Anti-Cloaking Device
Anti-Cloaking Device.description: Reveal all stealthed and invisible enemies within 10 yds at target location. Lasts 15 sec.

Arcane Bionics.name: Arcane Bionics
Arcane Bionics.description: Augment a party member with the essence of arcane, decreasing damage taken from spells by up to 3% and healing spells by up to 3%.  Lasts 5 min.

Arclight Adept.name: Arclight Adept
Arclight Adept.description: Increases the critical damage of your Mechsuit abilities by 15%.

Arclight Core.name: Arclight Core
Arclight Core.description:
Makeshift Dynamite now marks enemies for 6 seconds. 

The next damaging ability used on this target by your pet consumes the mark to deal 491 + 20% fire SP + 20% ranged AP Fire damage.

Augmechtation.name: Augmechtation
Augmechtation.description: Your Mechsuit now increases your damage by an additional 10% while active.

Augmentor.name: Augmentor
Augmentor.description: While Piercing Augmentation or Aether Augmentation is active, your ranged haste is increased by 10%.

Auto Resuscitation Device.name: Auto Resuscitation Device
Auto Resuscitation Device.description:
Attach a resuscitation device to your target ally for 20 seconds.

When the target would otherwise die, they are instead healed for 50% of their maximum health.

Backup Fuel.name: Backup Fuel
Backup Fuel.description:
Falling below 35% health now refreshes all charges of Rocket Boots.

Can occur only once every 3 min.

Bandage Gun.name: Bandage Gun
Bandage Gun.description: Healing from Stim Augmentation now affects 2 additional allies near the primary target.

Basic Intuition.name: Basic Intuition
Basic Intuition.description: For 10 sec, your |cffffffffBuild|r spells cost no mana, and their cast time is removed.

Battle Engineer.name: Battle Engineer
Battle Engineer.description:
Level 30 Passive
Your ranged damage dealt now has a 20% chance to refresh a charge of Makeshift Dynamite.

Bomb Builder.name: Bomb Builder
Bomb Builder.description: Increases your and your summons Fire Damage dealt by 5%.

Bomb Squad.name: Bomb Squad
Bomb Squad.description:
Level 40 Passive
Increases your Fire spell power by 50% of Agility.

Bomb Toss.name: Bomb Toss
Bomb Toss.description: Lob a bomb at an enemy, dealing 67 Fire damage and reducing their armor by 5% for 15 sec, stacking 4 times.

Bombastic.name: Bombastic
Bombastic.description:
Level 30 Passive
Casting Build: Spider Bomb now resets the cooldown of Bomb Toss and causes your next Bomb Toss within 15 seconds to trigger no cooldown, global cooldown, or cost.

Bomber Man.name: Bomber Man
Bomber Man.description:
Level 30 Passive
While Bombastic is active, your Bomb Tosses will additionally reduce the cooldown of Sticky Bomb by -1 sec.

Bombs? BOMBS!.name: Bombs? BOMBS!
Bombs? BOMBS!.description: Increases the detonation speed of Sticky Bomb by -1 sec and reduces its cooldown by -2 sec.

Boom Hour.name: Boom Hour
Boom Hour.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Bomb Toss and Firepot Drone by 10%.

Boomshot.name: Boomshot
Boomshot.description: Every 4th Scrap Shot now causes your next Scrap Shot within 15 seconds to deal 25% increased damage.

Build: Alarm Beacon.name: Build: Alarm Beacon
Build: Alarm Beacon.description:
3 Charges, 15 sec recharge
Throw down an alarm beacon for 10 seconds, removing fear, charm and sleep effects from up to 1 ally within 20 yds every 1 sec.

Build: Battle Turret X-13.name: Build: Battle Turret X-13
Build: Battle Turret X-13.description:
Create the latest in turret technology, the |cffffffffBattle Turret X-13|r for 30 sec that emanates an aura that increases the damage of your summons by 10%.

Allies can enter the turret giving them access to unique abilities and the turret's health pool for the duration.

Build: Clockwork Assistant.name: Build: Clockwork Assistant
Build: Clockwork Assistant.description: Construct a |cffffffffClockwork Assistant|r to accompany the Tinker until dismissed.

Build: Destructo-Bot.name: Build: Destructo-Bot
Build: Destructo-Bot.description:
Build a Destructo-Bot that you can see through and directly control.

The bot is capable of exploding, dealing massive Fire damage to enemies nearby and disorienting them for 3 seconds.

Build: Firepot Drone.name: Build: Firepot Drone
Build: Firepot Drone.description:
3 Charges, 10 sec recharge
Build a Firepot Drone that flies towards your target, dropping a bomb along its path and exploding upon landing, dealing 182 + 17.5% ranged AP + 55% fire SP Fire damage in a 5 yd radius, leaving oil on the ground for 6 seconds that slows enemies within by -30%.

Build: Mechano-Bear.name: Build: Mechano-Bear
Build: Mechano-Bear.description: Construct a |cffffffffMechano-Bear|r to accompany the Tinker until dismissed.

Build: Noise Box.name: Build: Noise Box
Build: Noise Box.description: Build a Noise Box for 15 seconds that periodically unleashes screeching noise on nearby enemies, interrupting spellcasts and preventing spells of that school from being cast for 3 seconds.

Build: Oil-Spill Pylon.name: Build: Oil-Spill Pylon
Build: Oil-Spill Pylon.description:
Build an Oil-Spill Pylon at target location for 10 seconds, spilling oil in an 8 yd radius that reduces enemies movement speed by -60% and increases their Fire damage taken by you by 15%.

Sticky Bomb Explosions and Firepot Drone deal 20% increased damage to enemies inside.

Build: Replenishment Beacon.name: Build: Replenishment Beacon

Build: Repulsion Unit.name: Build: Repulsion Unit
Build: Repulsion Unit.description: Build a Repulsion Unit that periodically knocks nearby enemies back every 5 sec for 20 seconds.

Build: Restorative Beacon.name: Build: Restorative Beacon
Build: Restorative Beacon.description:
3 Charges, 15 sec recharge
Throw down a restorative beacon for 15 seconds which projects a field that heals raid and party members in the area for 92 every 3 sec.

Build: Rusthound.name: Build: Rusthound
Build: Rusthound.description: Construct a |cffffffffRusthound|r to accompany the Tinker until dismissed.

Build: Scrapmaw.name: Build: Scrapmaw
Build: Scrapmaw.description: Build a Scrapmaw to accompany the Tinker until dismissed.

Build: Shield Beacon.name: Build: Shield Beacon

Build: Spider Bomb.name: Build: Spider Bomb
Build: Spider Bomb.description:
Build a Spider Bomb that will immediately run towards your target and detonate dealing 250 + 30% ranged AP Fire damage in an 8 yd radius.

Using Scrap Shot will redirect the Spider Bombs to your new target.

Build: Spider Bomb Factory.name: Build: Spider Bomb Factory
Build: Spider Bomb Factory.description:
Build a Spider Bomb Factory in front of you for 20 seconds.

For the duration, Bomb Toss and Rocket Launcher will summon 3 Spider Bombs, that will immediately run towards your target and detonate dealing 250 + 30% ranged AP Fire damage.

Using Scrap Shot will redirect the Spider Bombs to your new target.

Build: ZIGGI-6K.name: Build: ZIGGI-6K
Build: ZIGGI-6K.description:
Level 10 Passive
Teaches you Build: ZIGGI-6K.Build: ZIGGI-6KBuild ZIGGI-6K, the latest in regenerative technology, to aid you in healing allies until dismissed.

Bunker Operative.name: Bunker Operative
Bunker Operative.description: Reduces the cooldown of Kinetic Shield, Discombobulate!, and Repulsion Unit by -20%.

Buster Scope.name: Buster Scope
Buster Scope.description: Increases the critical damage of Rocket Launcher by 10%.

Clockwork Ingenuity.name: Clockwork Ingenuity
Clockwork Ingenuity.description: Increases the maximum health of your summons by 10%.

Cogmaster.name: Cogmaster
Cogmaster.description: Increases your critical strike chance by 2% and gives ranged critical strikes a 50% chance to generate 3 Scrap.

Combat Crafter.name: Combat Crafter
Combat Crafter.description:
Level 20 Passive
While in your Mechsuit, damage dealt by your summons now has a 20% chance to grant you 5 Scrap and 2% of your maximum mana.

Combat Symbiosis.name: Combat Symbiosis
Combat Symbiosis.description: Electrify an allies' body, increasing their haste by 20% and causing damage dealt by them to heal nearby allies for 15% of the value. Lasts for 15 seconds, or 20 attacks.

Concussive Spanner.name: Concussive Spanner
Concussive Spanner.description: Your Spanner Smash will now apply Concussion to the target.ConcussionYour target is unable to critically strike and their total primary attributes are reduced by -5% for 8 seconds.

Control Mechanical.name: Control Mechanical
Control Mechanical.description:
Control a Mechanical enemy up to level 1, forcing them to do your bidding for up to 5 min (8 sec vs players). 

The Mechanical has greatly increased melee and ranged attack speed, but will short-circuit over time, taking 2% of its maximum health as Nature damage every 3 sec.

Cutting Edge Technology.name: Cutting Edge Technology
Cutting Edge Technology.description: Increases the tick rate and healing done of Nanobot Reconstruction by 20%.

Cybernetic Revivification.name: Cybernetic Revivification
Cybernetic Revivification.description:
All nearby allies receive 6% more healing. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, your Alarm Beacon now dispels fear, charm, and sleep effects from 1 additional ally.

Deathball.name: Deathball
Deathball.description:
Launch 3 Deathballs in a line, increasing in speed the further they travel.

They explode when they come into contact with an enemy, dealing 1150 + 35% ranged AP Fire damage to nearby enemies, increased based on distance traveled.

Bot and Build abilities reduce the cooldown of this ability by -2 sec.

Defensive Utility.name: Defensive Utility
Defensive Utility.description: Your Mechsuit will now increase your armor by an additional 50%.

Defibrillate.name: Defibrillate
Defibrillate.description:
Brings up to 5 dead allies within 15 yds back to life with 70 health and 135 mana.

Cannot be cast when in combat.

Deploy Blast Mine.name: Deploy Blast Mine
Deploy Blast Mine.description:
Place down a |cffffffffBlast Mine|r, lasting 1 min.

When the mine is destroyed, or upon using |cffffffffRemote Detonation|r, up to 8 targets within 8 yds are blasted away and enemies take a minor amount of Fire damage.

Discombobulate!.name: Discombobulate!
Discombobulate!.description:
Discombobulate an enemy, disorienting them for 4 sec.

Damage dealt will end the effect.

Drone Striker.name: Drone Striker
Drone Striker.description: Firepot Drone and Scrap Shot now deal 2% increased damage for each stack of Napalm on the enemy.Napalm (Damage)Fire Damage taken by you is increased and healing received reduced by -3% for 8 seconds. Stacks 10 times.

Duobombers.name: Duobombers
Duobombers.description: Build: Spider Bomb now creates an additional Spider Bomb that rushes towards your target.

Efficiency.name: Efficiency
Efficiency.description: Reduces the mana cost of all spells and abilities by -10%.

Electromagnetic Resistors.name: Electromagnetic Resistors
Electromagnetic Resistors.description: Nanobots now grant a 30% chance to resist movement impairing effects for 15 seconds.

Emergency Circumvented.name: Emergency Circumvented
Emergency Circumvented.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Emergency Heal by 15% and allows the periodic healing done by Med Pack to critically strike.

Emergency Enhancer.name: Emergency Enhancer
Emergency Enhancer.description: Zap! now causes your active Build abilities to zap the lowest health nearby ally, healing them for 490 + 90% healing.

Emergency Heal.name: Emergency Heal
Emergency Heal.description: Launch a quick healing stimshot at an ally, healing them for 70.

Engine Augmentation.name: Engine Augmentation
Engine Augmentation.description: For 8 seconds after activating your Mechsuit, all damage dealt will now generate 3 Scrap.

Enhanced Procedures.name: Enhanced Procedures
Enhanced Procedures.description: Increases the duration of Med Pack by 100% and it's healing by 75%.

Epiphany!.name: Epiphany!
Epiphany!.description: Casting Beacon abilities now reduces the cooldown of My Greatest Invention! by -20 sec.

Eureka!.name: Eureka!
Eureka!.description: Direct healing critical strikes now increase the healing done by your next Repair Shot or Emergency Heal by 30% for 10 seconds.

Explosive Augmentation.name: Explosive Augmentation
Explosive Augmentation.description:
Add an |cffffffffExplosive Augmentation|r to your gun for 1 hour, causing your ranged attacks to explode on your target dealing 1 Fire damage to them and nearby enemies.

Can only occur once per sec.

Explosive Inventor.name: Explosive Inventor
Explosive Inventor.description:
Spider Bomb Factory now also summons a Heavy Spider Bomb.

Heavy Spider Bombs move slowly, and deal 1231 + 55% ranged AP Fire damage when they reach their target and slow their movement speed by -70% for 2 seconds.

Explosive Personality.name: Explosive Personality
Explosive Personality.description: Increases your ranged attack power by 50% of your Intellect.

Explosives Expert.name: Explosives Expert
Explosives Expert.description: Direct harmful ability critical strikes from you or your summons now restores 4% of your maximum mana.

Field Medic.name: Field Medic
Field Medic.description: Increases your and your summons critical strike chance by 5%.

Fine Tuned.name: Fine Tuned
Fine Tuned.description: Increases the critical strike and hit chance of you and your summons by 4%.

Fine Tuning.name: Fine Tuning
Fine Tuning.description:
Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3%.

Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, not critically healing now increases your critical strike chance by 1%, stacking 10 times, until your next effective critical heal.

Flak Guns.name: Flak Guns
Flak Guns.description: Your Mechsuit: Combustion now has 10% increased critical strike chance and 15% increased critical damage.

Flame Jets.name: Flame Jets
Flame Jets.description: While inside your Mechsuit, damage dealt by your Scrap Shot and Makeshift Dynamite now applies Living Flame to the target.Living Flame (Damage)Deals 32 Fire Damage every 2 sec and increases the damage the target takes from your Mechsuit: Combustion by 10% for 4.5 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Flamethrowing.name: Flamethrowing
Flamethrowing.description: When you Bomb Toss, your Sentry Turret unleashes flames on your target, dealing 89+18+ranged AP*0.12+SPFI*0.4. Fire damage to enemies in a 30 yd line.

Freeze Ray.name: Freeze Ray
Freeze Ray.description: Fire an icy ray at all enemies in a line, |cffffffffFreezing|r them in place for 40 sec (8 sec vs players). Damage dealt may end this effect.

Frozen Bomb Launcher.name: Frozen Bomb Launcher
Frozen Bomb Launcher.description: Damage dealt by your Sentry Turrets will now slow enemy movement speed by -15% for 10 seconds, stacking 3 times.

Function Over Form.name: Function Over Form
Function Over Form.description: Increases the effectiveness of Aether Augmentation by 50%.

Gazlowe's Wisdom.name: Gazlowe's Wisdom
Gazlowe's Wisdom.description:
You now spawn 2 Shrapnel Mines under your target when Sticky Bomb explodes.
Shrapnel MineWhen you use Remote Detonation, deal 264 + 25% AP + 38.5% SP Physical damage to up to 5 enemies within 10 yds. The mine lasts 1 minute.

Goblin Depravity.name: Goblin Depravity
Goblin Depravity.description: Air Strike now drops Tear Gas, dealing 132 + 11% nature SP + 100% AP Nature damage every 2 sec for 12 seconds.

Graftbolts.name: Graftbolts
Graftbolts.description:
Level 40 Passive
Effective healing done now has a 25% chance to grant you GraftboltsGraftboltsRestores 15% maximum mana to your pet and increases the damage and healing done by your summons by a percentage equal to 10% of your healing spell power for 6 seconds..

Greater Mana Module.name: Greater Mana Module
Greater Mana Module.description:
Empower nearby party and raid members with a mana module, restoring 33 mana every 5 seconds for 30 min.

Only one |cffffffffModule|r per Tinker can be active.

Greater Power Module.name: Greater Power Module
Greater Power Module.description:
Activates power module on raid and party members, increasing attack power by 232 for 30 min.

Only one |cffffffffModule|r per Tinker can be active.

Grenadier.name: Grenadier
Grenadier.description: When you reach 5 stacks of Napalm on a target you refresh 1 charge of Build: Firepot Drone.

Hacking the Enemy.name: Hacking the Enemy
Hacking the Enemy.description: Your Piercing Augmentation now ignores an additional 10% of your target's armor and grants you -10 increased spell penetration.

Hasty Tech.name: Hasty Tech
Hasty Tech.description: Reduces the cast time of Scrap Shot and Repair Shot by -15%.

Haywired State!.name: Haywired State!
Haywired State!.description: Casting Mechsuit abilities now causes your pet to enter a haywired state for 6 seconds.Haywired State!Auto attacks now zap up to 10 nearby enemies for 159 + 35% AP Stormstrike Damage and damaged enemies take 20% increased damage from your summons.

Healing Radiator.name: Healing Radiator
Healing Radiator.description: Periodic healing done by Nanobot Reconstruction now restores 27 + 4.03% healing health to 5 allied players within 10 yds of the affected target.

Hyperblast Barrage.name: Hyperblast Barrage
Hyperblast Barrage.description:
Unleash a barrage of shrapnel, dealing 831 + 36% ranged AP + 55% fire SP Fire damage to enemies in a line, applying a lesser Sticky Bomb to each target struck that deals 297 + 10% fire SP + 50% AP Fire damage after 3 sec.

After 3 seconds, your active Sentry Turret will also fire a Hyperblast Barrage.

I Need More Explosions!.name: I Need More Explosions!
I Need More Explosions!.description: Increases the damage of Sticky Bomb Explosions by 15%.

I'm The Creator Now.name: I'm The Creator Now
I'm The Creator Now.description: Damage dealt by your summons now has a 40% chance to increase your attack power and spell power by 9 for 30 seconds, stacking 3 times.

Improved Emergency Heal.name: Improved Emergency Heal
Improved Emergency Heal.description: Increases the healing and reduces the mana cost of Emergency Heal by -20%.

Improved Graftbolts.name: Improved Graftbolts
Improved Graftbolts.description:
Level 50 Passive
Your Graftbolts now stacks 2 additional times.

Incendiary Bullets.name: Incendiary Bullets
Incendiary Bullets.description: Increases the damage of Scrap Shot by 15% and increases your chance to hit by 2%.

Innate Brilliance.name: Innate Brilliance
Innate Brilliance.description: While Aether Augmentation is active, every 4th Scrap Shot now grants you Innate Brilliance.Innate Brilliance (Buff)Your next Scrap Shot has 5 yds increased range, deals 15% increased damage, and drains 125 + 10% ranged AP of your target's mana. Lasts 10 seconds.

Inventor's Tool Belt.name: Inventor's Tool Belt
Inventor's Tool Belt.description: Increases your and your pet's Intellect by 10% and you are both now unable to miss your attacks.

J27 Upgrade.name: J27 Upgrade
J27 Upgrade.description: Reduces the mana cost of your Nanobots by -10% and they now last 10 additional sec.

Junker.name: Junker
Junker.description: Casting Spanner Smash and Scrap Shot now increases your pet's attack power by 5% for 15 seconds, stacking 2 times.

Junkyard Loiter.name: Junkyard Loiter
Junkyard Loiter.description:
When you deal damage with Mechsuit: Laser Beam or Mechsuit: Combustion you now launch a Lesser Sticky Bomb on each target struck.Lesser Sticky BombThrows a bomb that sticks to the enemy for 3 sec.

At the end of the duration the bomb will explode, dealing 17 + 5% fire SP + 2.5% AP Fire Damage to the target.

Kinetic Shield.name: Kinetic Shield
Kinetic Shield.description:
Create magnetic shields of kinetic energy on an ally target for 8 seconds, reducing damage taken by -40% and making them immune to stun effects.

Usable while stunned.

Machine Synergy.name: Machine Synergy
Machine Synergy.description: Casting Scrap Shot now adds a stack of Machine Synergy to your active pet and Sentry Turret.Machine SynergyIncreases damage dealt by 5% and haste by 3%, stacking 3 times, for 6 seconds.

Macro Designer.name: Macro Designer
Macro Designer.description: Increases the duration of your Beacons by 5 sec and Med Pack by 3 sec.

Macro-Gravity Zone.name: Macro-Gravity Zone
Macro-Gravity Zone.description:
Create a macro-gravity zone at target location for 8 seconds.

Enemies within the zone have their movement speed slowed by -50% and gain 1 stack of Macro-Gravity every 1 sec.Macro-GravityAt 6 stacks, the affected enemy will be stunned for 6 seconds.

Magic Augmentation.name: Magic Augmentation
Magic Augmentation.description:
Add a |cffffffffMagic Augmentation|r to your gun for 1 hour, causing an additional 2 Magic damage with each shot.

Increases the range of your ranged abilities by 5 yds.

Makeshift Dynamite.name: Makeshift Dynamite
Makeshift Dynamite.description:
|cffffffff2 Charges, 8 sec recharge|R
|cffc7c7c7Generates 10 Scrap|r
Load dynamite into your gun and launch it at an enemy, dealing 100% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 20 as Fire damage.

Usable while moving.

Mana Capacitors.name: Mana Capacitors
Mana Capacitors.description: Reduces the cost of Overcharge by -15% and reduces its cooldown by -10%.

Mana Module.name: Mana Module
Mana Module.description:
Empower an ally with a mana module, restoring 10 mana every 5 seconds for 30 min.

Only one |cffffffffModule|r per Tinker can be active.

Maniacal.name: Maniacal
Maniacal.description: Reduces the cooldown of Sticky Bomb and Deploy Blast Mine by -2 sec.

Master Builder.name: Master Builder
Master Builder.description: Reduces the mana cost of all Build abilities by -25%.

Master Technician.name: Master Technician
Master Technician.description:
Scrap Shot and Mechsuit abilities now grants your Sentry Turret a stack of Master Technician, stacking 10 times.

At 10 stacks, your Sentry Turret will unleash a beam dealing 725 + 75% fire SP + 40% AP Fire damage in a 25 yd line, piercing invulnerabilities.

Mechanical Enhancements.name: Mechanical Enhancements
Mechanical Enhancements.description: Reduces your damage taken from bleed effects by -10% and the duration of bleed effects on you by -20%.

Mechanical Extender.name: Mechanical Extender
Mechanical Extender.description:
Casting Scrap Shot and Mechsuit abilities now increases the chance to trigger Overload by 3% for 10 seconds, stacking 10 times.

When Overload triggers, all stacks are consumed.

Mechanical Synergy.name: Mechanical Synergy
Mechanical Synergy.description: Increases the damage of Sticky Bomb Explosion and Mechsuit abilities by 15%.

Mechanosoldier.name: Mechanosoldier
Mechanosoldier.description: Increases the damage reduced by Kinetic Shield by -10% and its duration by 2 sec.

Mechaplating.name: Mechaplating
Mechaplating.description: Whenever your summons critically strike, reduce your and your pet's damage taken by -2% for 15 seconds, stacking 4 times.

Mechsuit: Activate Jets.name: Mechsuit: Activate Jets
Mechsuit: Activate Jets.description:
Launch forward and slow your falling speed. 

When you hit the ground you blast nearby enemies for 275 Fire damage based on time in the air.

Mechsuit: Combustion.name: Mechsuit: Combustion

Mechsuit: Laser Beam.name: Mechsuit: Laser Beam
Mechsuit: Laser Beam.description:
Blast an enemy with a laser, dealing 100% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 39 as Fire Damage and forcing your pet to charge to the enemy for 24 Physical Damage.

@ext:Shares a cooldown with other |cffffffffMechsuit|r abilities.:ext@

Med Pack.name: Med Pack
Med Pack.description: Toss a med pack to an ally, healing for 354 over 6 sec and cleanses all bleed, poison and disease effects.

Medical Degree.name: Medical Degree
Medical Degree.description: Increases the cooldown of Med Pack by 30 sec, but allows it to affect up to 4 additional targets around your ally.

Mega Scope.name: Mega Scope
Mega Scope.description: Increases the range of Rocket Launcher by 10 yds.

Modulator.name: Modulator
Modulator.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Modules by 20%.

My Greatest Invention!.name: My Greatest Invention!
My Greatest Invention!.description: Show off your Greatest Invention, healing party and raid members in a 30 yd radius for 823 + 65% healing every 2 sec for 9 seconds.

Nano-Repair Tech.name: Nano-Repair Tech
Nano-Repair Tech.description: You and your pet now regenerate 3% of your maximum health every 8 sec.

Nanobot Cleanser.name: Nanobot Cleanser
Nanobot Cleanser.description:
Send Nanobots to an ally removing 1 poison and disease effect every 3 sec for up to 15 seconds.

Nanobot Cleanser can only be sent to 1 target at a time and can't be dispelled.

Nanobot Recharger.name: Nanobot Recharger
Nanobot Recharger.description:
Send |cffffffffNanobots|r to an ally, regenerating 13 mana every 5 sec for 1 min.

|cffffffffNanobot Recharger|r can only be sent to 1 target at a time and cannot be dispelled.

Nanobot Reconstruction.name: Nanobot Reconstruction
Nanobot Reconstruction.description:
Send |cffffffffNanobots|r to an ally, healing them for 600 over 1 min.

|cffffffffNanobot Reconstruction|r can only be sent to 1 target at a time and cannot be dispelled.

Nanobot Swarm.name: Nanobot Swarm
Nanobot Swarm.description:
Send |cffffffffNanobots|r to an ally, dealing 19 damage to nearby enemies every 4 sec for 1 min. All threat generated by you is redirected to the target.

|cffffffffNanobot Swarm|r can only be sent to 1 target at time and cannot be dispelled.

Napalm.name: Napalm
Napalm.description:
Level 10 Passive
Dealing direct Fire damage now applies Napalm to your target.Napalm (Damage)Fire Damage taken by you is increased and healing received reduced by -3% for 8 seconds. Stacks 10 times.

Offensive Utility.name: Offensive Utility
Offensive Utility.description: While in your Mechsuit, casting Sticky Bomb reduces the channel time of your next Gatling Gun within 5 seconds by -30%.

Over-Repaired.name: Over-Repaired
Over-Repaired.description: Increases the healing done by Repair Shot by 15%.

Overclocked Machine.name: Overclocked Machine
Overclocked Machine.description:
Overclock your pet for for 20 seconds, increasing its damage dealt by 20% and allowing it's attacks to trigger Hardwired Haymaker on the target enemy. 

Additionally, your pet will trigger Overclocked Smash every 5 sec.

Overload.name: Overload
Overload.description: Damage dealt by Mechsuit: Combustion and Mechsuit: Laser Beam now have a 40% chance to strike 2 additional times for 30% of the damage dealt.

Parachute Pack.name: Parachute Pack
Parachute Pack.description: Equip party and raid members within 15 yds with a |cFFFFFFFFParachute|r for 1 min, automatically deploying and slowing their fall speed.

Piercing Augmentation.name: Piercing Augmentation
Piercing Augmentation.description:
Add a |cffffffffPiercing Augmentation|r to your gun for 1 hour, causing an additional 3 Physical damage with each shot.

Allows your attacks to ignore 25% of your target's armor and grants you 20 spell penetration.

Power Module.name: Power Module
Power Module.description:
Activates power module on an allied player, increasing attack power by 19 for 30 min.

Only one |cffffffffModule|r per Tinker can be active.

Rapid Fire Healing.name: Rapid Fire Healing
Rapid Fire Healing.description: Casting Repair Shot or Emergency Heal now has a 15% chance to refresh a charge of Beacons.

Refined Gunpowder.name: Refined Gunpowder
Refined Gunpowder.description: Increases your haste and your damage dealt against Mechanical creatures by 3%.

Regeneration Enhancement.name: Regeneration Enhancement
Regeneration Enhancement.description: When you enter your Mechsuit, it now refunds 20% of your base mana, repeating every 20 sec while inside.

Rejuvenating Gadget.name: Rejuvenating Gadget
Rejuvenating Gadget.description: Critical strikes with Zap! now apply Rejuvenating Gas to up to 12 allies within 8 yards of your target that restores 15% of the value of the shot as health every 2 sec for 10 seconds.

Repair Shot.name: Repair Shot
Repair Shot.description: Fire a healing stimshot at an ally, healing them for 38.

Resourceful Tech.name: Resourceful Tech
Resourceful Tech.description: Your Zap! is now guaranteed to critically strike allies affected by Nanobots.

Rockadier.name: Rockadier
Rockadier.description: Empowers the next 6 Scrap Shots or Rocket Launchers within 30 seconds deal additional Fire damage equal to 100% of the damage dealt to up to 10 enemies around the target.

Rocket Barrage.name: Rocket Barrage
Rocket Barrage.description: Increases the amount of stacks of Tracer Augmentation by 5, and its duration by 7 sec, and causes damage dealt by Bomb Toss on enemies with 10 stacks to launch a Rocket Barrage at their location.Rocket Barrage (Damage)Deals 1290 + 17.5% AP + 11% fire SP Fire Damage to nearby enemies after 5 seconds.

Rocket Bombardment.name: Rocket Bombardment
Rocket Bombardment.description: Casting Sticky Bomb now causes your Sentry Turret to fire a rocket cluster on its next attack, causing 126 Fire damage to enemies within 5 yds of the target.

Rocket Boots.name: Rocket Boots
Rocket Boots.description:
3 Charges, 30 sec recharge
Activate your Rocket Boots, dispelling root effects and launching you forward.

Rocket Engineering.name: Rocket Engineering
Rocket Engineering.description: Direct harmful ability critical strikes now apply an additional stack of Tracer Augmentation to the target while active on the enemy.

Rocket Launcher.name: Rocket Launcher
Rocket Launcher.description: Fire a powerful rocket at an enemy that deals 174 Fire damage.

Rocket Pack.name: Rocket Pack
Rocket Pack.description: Fire critical strikes now reduce the remaining cooldown of Rockadier by -3 sec.

Rocket Turrets.name: Rocket Turrets
Rocket Turrets.description: Allows Machine Synergy to stack 2 additional times and using Rocket Launcher now causes your Sentry Turret to also cast Rocket Launcher.Machine SynergyIncreases damage dealt by 5% and haste by 3%, stacking 3 times, for 6 seconds.

Scientific Nature.name: Scientific Nature
Scientific Nature.description:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your healing power by 20% of your Intellect and your critical strike rating by 15% of your Intellect.

Scrap Shot.name: Scrap Shot
Scrap Shot.description: Shoot an enemy with scrap debris, dealing 100% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 14.

Scrapper.name: Scrapper
Scrapper.description:
Search and rummage through nearby debris, gaining 10 Scrap and 25 mana every 1 sec for 5 seconds.

Not usable in combat.

Scrapshielding.name: Scrapshielding
Scrapshielding.description: Your critical strikes now grant you a shield that absorbs 177 + 15% AP + 60% SP damage.

Self-Sustaining Technology.name: Self-Sustaining Technology
Self-Sustaining Technology.description:
Damage or healing done by your pet or summons now heals you equal to 15% of the value. 

In addition, damage or healing done by you now restores health and mana to your pet equal to 15% of the value. 

Each of these effects can only occur once per sec.

Short Fuse.name: Short Fuse
Short Fuse.description: Sparked and Ready now also increases the critical strike chance of Rocket Launcher by 20%.

Slam the Cogs!.name: Slam the Cogs!
Slam the Cogs!.description: Increases the damage dealt by you and your summons by 4%.

Spanner Smash.name: Spanner Smash
Spanner Smash.description:
Smash an enemy with your spanner, dealing 110% Weapon Damage plus 22.

Guaranteed to critically strike against Mechanicals.

Sparked and Ready!.name: Sparked and Ready!
Sparked and Ready!.description:
Level 20 Passive
Fire damage dealt has a 5% chance to grant you Sparked and Ready!.Sparked and Ready!Causes your next Rocket Launcher, within 10 seconds, to be instant cast and deal 20% increased damage.

Sprocket Loaded.name: Sprocket Loaded
Sprocket Loaded.description: Casting Makeshift Dynamite now resets the cooldown of your Mechsuit abilities.

Sticky Bomb.name: Sticky Bomb
Sticky Bomb.description:
Throw a bomb that sticks to the enemy for 5 sec.

At the end of the duration the bomb will explode, dealing 20 Fire damage to the target and 4 enemies within 8 yds of the target.

Can target corpses.

Stim Augmentation.name: Stim Augmentation
Stim Augmentation.description: Add a Stim Augmentation to your gun for 1 hour, causing your direct healing abilities to heal up to 3 nearby friendly players for an additional 20% of the amount healed.

Stim Pack.name: Stim Pack
Stim Pack.description: Effective healing with Stim Augmentation now reduces the cooldown of Med Pack by -3 sec.

Stim Shots.name: Stim Shots
Stim Shots.description: Your Stim Augmentation now heals for an additional 10% of the amount healed.

Strength Bionics.name: Strength Bionics
Strength Bionics.description: Amplifies magic used against the targeted party member, increasing damage taken from spells by up to 75 and healing spells by up to 80.  Lasts 10 min.

Surprise Launch!.name: Surprise Launch!
Surprise Launch!.description: When Rocket Launcher is used on enemies affected by Sticky Bomb it is now guaranteed to critically strike.

Tank Buster.name: Tank Buster
Tank Buster.description: Your Scrap Shot now ignores 25% of the target's Armor when damaging Burning targets.

Target Acquired.name: Target Acquired
Target Acquired.description: Your Sticky Bomb Explosions and Spider Bomb now deal 30% increased damage when it strikes only 1 target.

Technician.name: Technician
Technician.description: Reduces spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 35% and increases your critical healing by 10%.

The BIG Guns!.name: The BIG Guns!
The BIG Guns!.description:
Increases the attack power of all party and raid members 5%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, increases your ranged attack power by 3%.

Tracer Augmentation.name: Tracer Augmentation
Tracer Augmentation.description:
Add a Tracer Augmentation to your gun for 1 hour, causing your ranged attacks to mark enemies for 5 seconds, stacking 5 times. After the duration they explode for 80 + 8% ranged AP + 15% fire SP Fire damage, increased based on stacks.

Marked enemies are prevented from entering stealth or invisibility for 20 seconds.

Trust the Science!.name: Trust the Science!
Trust the Science!.description: Reduces the cooldown of Zap! by -5 sec.

Turbo Guns.name: Turbo Guns
Turbo Guns.description: Reduces the cast time of your Mechsuit: Combustion by 0.25 sec and its damage is increased by 20%.

Turbo Upgrade!.name: Turbo Upgrade!
Turbo Upgrade!.description:
Level 40 Passive
Increases the effectiveness of your Mechsuit by 100%.

Turret Upgrade Z-15.name: Turret Upgrade Z-15
Turret Upgrade Z-15.description: Damage dealt by Sentry Turrets now has a 30% chance to cause 47 + 20% AP additional Nature damage and increase critical strike chance of the turret by 1%, stacking 5 times, for 8 seconds.

Upgrade!.name: Upgrade!
Upgrade!.description: Upgrade nearby Sentry Turrets to a Molten Grenade Turret for 1 minute.Molten Grenade TurretUpgrades the Sentry Turret to fire grenades, increasing its attack speed significantly and causing it to deal 133 Fire Damage in an 8 yd radius, plus an additional 95 + 15% fire SP + 8.5% AP Fire Damage over 1.5 seconds.

Ventilation.name: Ventilation
Ventilation.description: Direct magic damage taken now has a 50% chance to increase all magic resistances of allies within 8 yds of you by 15 for 6 seconds.

War Crimes.name: War Crimes
War Crimes.description: Damage dealt by Explosive Augmentation and Tracer Augmentation now has a 50% chance to apply an additional stack of Napalm to enemies.Napalm (Damage)Fire Damage taken by you is increased and healing received reduced by -3% for 8 seconds. Stacks 10 times.

Warning Shot.name: Warning Shot
Warning Shot.description: The current party or raid member targeted will receive the threat caused by your next damaging attack and all actions taken for 4 sec afterwards.

Zap!.name: Zap!
Zap!.description:
Fires a long range zap of electricity that heals an ally for 332.

Scales with modifiers to |cffffffffRepair Shot|r.
